tasks.label: Git Push - Phase-2-week-10-Home Assignment
tasks.command: cd "d:\GEN AI-2026\Phase-2-Week-10\Deliverables" && git init && git checkout -b "Phase-2-week-10-Home-Assignment" 2>nul || git checkout -b "Phase-2-week-10-Home-Assignment" && git add . && git commit -m "Phase-2-week-10-Home Assignment" && (git remote add origin https://github.com/acsanjeevi/GEN-AI-2026-Phase-2.git 2>nul || git remote set-url origin https://github.com/acsanjeevi/GEN-AI-2026-Phase-2.git) && git push -u origin "Phase-2-week-10-Home-Assignment"
